category.scope_note: China-export cross-standard comparison for portable lithium cells, battery packs, and power banks to Thailand (TISI) in a broad category matrix.

title.en: China-to-Thailand Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入泰国市场：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入泰國市場：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Cross-standard, category-breadth comparison for China-export lithium batteries and power banks entering Thailand via TISI, with notes on safety, radio/EMC, transport, import market access, and UN 38.3 logistics alignment.
description.zh: 面向中国出口产品的泰国入市交叉标准对照，覆盖TISI体系下的锂电池与移动电源在安全、无线/EMC、运输、市场准入和UN 38.3物流衔接等要点。
description.zht: 面向中國出口產品的泰國入市交叉標準對照，涵蓋TISI體系下的鋰電池與行動電源在安全、無線/EMC、運輸、市场准入和UN 38.3物流銜接等要點。

disclaimer.en: This is an informational comparison only and does not replace product certification, legal review, customs brokerage, or official legal advice. Chinese exporters should confirm final obligations with official sources and a Thai compliance partner before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅供信息比较，不能替代产品认证、法律审核、海关报关或正式法律意见。中国出口商应在出货前通过官方来源及泰国合规顾问确认实际义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅供資訊比較，不能替代產品認證、法律審核、海關報關或正式法律意見。中國出口商應在出貨前透過官方來源及泰國合規顧問確認實際義務。

answer_first.en: Major gaps are Thailand mandatory TIS conformity pathways for controlled battery products, mandatory or function-linked NBTC requirements for radio features, and country-specific importer/licence and port-clearance workflow. UN 38.3 remains the core lithium transport baseline and requires evidence alignment to Thailand-facing logistics.
answer_first.zh: 主要差距集中于泰国控制类锂电产品的TIS合规路径、含无线功能时的NBTC要求，以及境内进口许可持有人和港口清关流程。UN 38.3是核心运输基线且需与泰国端物流要求对接。
answer_first.zht: 主要差距集中於泰國受控鋰電產品的TIS合規路徑、含無線功能時的NBTC要求，以及境內進口許可持有人和港口清關流程。UN 38.3是核心運輸基線且需與泰國端物流要求對接。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows are informational only and are updated when official source pages change or major policy adjustments are confirmed.
